legales.intro: financeAI is a beta product built for the ONE G9 Hackathon (Alura + Oracle). By creating an account or using the app you accept these terms. Take a moment to read them - they are short and written to be understood.
legales.s1p: financeAI is an educational tool that organizes the transactions you record, classifies your spending with a machine-learning model, and shows you indicators, budgets, goals and recommendations about your financial behavior. It is not a bank, it does not hold money, and it does not execute payments or transfers.
legales.s2p: The information, indicators and recommendations generated by the app are educational and general in nature; they do not constitute financial, accounting, tax or investment advice. Consult a certified professional before making important economic decisions. You are solely responsible for the decisions you make based on the app.
legales.s3p: You need an account with an email and password to use the dashboard. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential, and we recommend enabling two-factor authentication from your profile. If you detect unauthorized use of your account, let us know immediately.
legales.s4p: The financial data the app analyzes is the data you enter manually or import from a file; we do not connect to your banks or third parties. We use your data only to generate your analysis, we do not sell it or share it for advertising, and passwords are stored encrypted. You can correct or delete your transactions and request the deletion of your account at any time.
legales.s5p: Your transaction categories and your financial profile are computed by machine-learning models that can make mistakes. You can always correct a category, and your correction permanently prevails over the model for that transaction.
legales.s6p: The app is under active development: it may contain bugs, change without notice, or reset stored information. Some beta environments run on demo data clearly identified with the corresponding label.
legales.s7p: financeAI's code, design, brands and content belong to its development team. The data you record belongs to you.
legales.s8p: To use financeAI you must be at least 18 years old or the age of majority in your country. The app is not directed at minors and we do not knowingly collect data from minors.
legales.s9p: We store on your device (localStorage on the web and app storage on mobile) only what the app needs to work: your session and your preferences, such as language. We do not use third-party trackers or advertising cookies.
legales.s10p: You can access, rectify, delete and object to the processing of your data at any time (ARCO / LGPD-style rights). Correcting and deleting transactions is available directly in the app; for full account deletion, write to the team's email and we will process it free of charge.
legales.s11p: During the beta, the app is provided "as is", with no warranties of availability, accuracy or fitness for a particular purpose. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the team shall not be liable for losses or damages arising from decisions made based on the information shown.
legales.s12p: These terms are governed by the mandatory legislation of the user's country of residence and, beyond that, by the general principles applicable to free digital services. Any dispute will first be addressed amicably by contacting the team.
legales.s13p: We may update these terms as the product evolves; if a change is significant we will announce it inside the app. For questions, feedback or data requests, contact us through the team's email.

privacidad.intro: This policy explains what data financeAI processes, why, and which rights you have. It complements the Terms and conditions and applies equally to the web and the mobile app.
privacidad.p1p: The controller is the financeAI development team, a project built for the ONE G9 Hackathon (Alura + Oracle). For anything related to your data, write to the team's email; while the project is in beta we handle requests directly.
privacidad.p2p: Account: email and password (stored encrypted, never in plain text). Financial profile: monthly income, debt level, savings frequency, currency and language. Transactions: the entries you record manually or import via CSV, with their description, amount and date. We do not collect your location, contacts or data from other apps, and we do not connect to your banks.
privacidad.p3p: For a single purpose: generating your analysis - classifying your spending, computing your indicators, assigning your financial profile and giving you recommendations. We do not sell your data, share it with advertisers, or use it to profile you for commercial purposes.
privacidad.p4p: We process your data because you consent when creating your account (acceptance is recorded with version, date and time) and because it is essential to provide the service you request. You can withdraw your consent at any time by deleting your account.
privacidad.p5t: 5. Where it lives and for how long
privacidad.p5p: On your device we only store your session and preferences. Your account data lives in the project's database and is kept while the account exists; deleting it erases everything permanently. During the beta, some environments run on demo data that belongs to no real person.
privacidad.p6p: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and object to processing (ARCO-type rights) and their Brazilian LGPD equivalents, including portability. In practice: from your Profile you can export all your data as a JSON file and delete your account with everything attached, with no paperwork and no cost.
privacidad.p7p: We use no trackers, pixels or advertising cookies, and we do not hand data to third parties. If this policy changes in a meaningful way we will announce it inside the app and update the date on this page.

licencias.intro: financeAI is built on open source software. These are the main libraries and typefaces we use, with their licenses. Thanks to their authors.
